description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a predominantly black upper with vibrant pink accents and a marbled white-and-black collar. The shoe has a low-top design with a padded tongue and collar for comfort, and a lace-up closure with black-and-white patterned laces. The midsole is light gray, while the outsole is pink with some black and gray detailing, providing both style and traction. The side of the shoe displays a stylized logo in pink, and there are additional pink elements on the heel tab and lace supports. The interior lining is a bright red, adding a striking contrast to the exterior. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic fabric, rubber, and foam for durability and cushioning.
description: A black athletic shoe with pink accents, marbled collar, and patterned laces, featuring a cushioned sole and a bright red interior lining.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the red interior lining, black-and-white patterned laces, and marbled collar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink logo, lace supports, and the layered sole with pink and gray details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the marbled collar, pink heel tab, and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel tab, marbled collar, and the layered construction of the sole.
attribute_logo: pink stylized logo on the side and a small pink square logo on the heel tab
